scripts.api:dev: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn research_agent.main:app --reload --host ${AGENT_OS_HOST:-localhost} --port ${AGENT_OS_PORT:-7777} --log-level warning
scripts.api:eval: cd apps/api && uv run python scripts/run_evals.py
scripts.lint: bun --filter @research-agent/cli lint && cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format: bun --filter @research-agent/cli format && cd apps/api && uv run ruff format .
